docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, JENNIFER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO SEP-02-2021 AT 8:30 A.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,265.00 FILED BY SMITH, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT OBENSKI, AMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED MAY-28-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OBENSKI, AMY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-02-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $632.50. DEFENDANT SHALL SUBMIT PAYMENT THROUGH PAYPAL. APPEARANCES ARE NOT REQUIRED AT THE NEXT PROGRESS REPORT DATE IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER SMITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMY OBENSKIIS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
